title: Khushi Films — Cinematic Storytelling & Production Site

beforeAfter.before: Disjointed portfolio clips with slow video asset loading times.
beforeAfter.after: Bespoke high-contrast dark aesthetic with fluid video galleries and instant showreel streaming.

timeline.label: Creative Direction
timeline.desc: Mapping cinematic grid layouts and showreel typography.

timeline.label: Frontend Build
timeline.desc: React/Vite implementation with Framer Motion transitions.

sections.title: The Challenge
sections.content: Khushi Films needed a cinematic web platform that matched the visual fidelity of their high-budget film productions without compromising fast page load times.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.content: We engineered an ultra-sleek, media-optimized web experience utilizing lazy-loaded video viewports, custom Framer Motion transitions, and high-contrast typography.

sections.title: The Outcome
sections.content: A high-conversion production studio website that immerses visitors in their film catalog instantly across desktop and mobile devices.

title: House of Biryani & Rolls — Culinary Brand Experience

beforeAfter.before: Static PDF menu links and unoptimized mobile ordering directions.
beforeAfter.after: High-appetite visual menu cards, fast branch directory, and direct ordering CTA flow.

timeline.label: UI & Menu Design
timeline.desc: Structuring food categories and brand color tokens.

timeline.label: React Development
timeline.desc: Custom menu components, fast search filters, and location maps.

sections.title: The Challenge
sections.content: House of Biryani & Rolls needed a digital brand hub that captured their 'Royal Experience' culinary identity while making online menu browsing frictionless.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.content: We created a rich visual palette with high-density culinary presentation cards, instant category filters, and direct ordering links for each location.

sections.title: The Outcome
sections.content: A high-conversion restaurant website that drives foot traffic and online orders across all outlet locations.

title: Aura Pixel — Digital Marketing & Performance Agency

beforeAfter.before: Generic template landing page that lacked proof of performance ROI.
beforeAfter.after: High-impact neo-brutalist agency hub with case study breakdowns and instant lead capture forms.

timeline.label: Strategy & Copy
timeline.desc: Refining service packages, SEO audit metrics, and conversion triggers.

timeline.label: Engine Build
timeline.desc: Custom React implementation with structured JSON-LD schemas.

sections.title: The Challenge
sections.content: Aura Pixel needed an authoritative web platform that proved their technical competence in performance marketing, SEO, and paid ad management.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.content: We built a crisp, high-contrast digital agency web app that surfaces client case studies, strategy roadmaps, and audit lead captures.

sections.title: The Outcome
sections.content: An automated inbound lead machine that positions Aura Pixel as a top-tier digital marketing partner.

beforeAfter.before: Traditional offline astrology consultations without digital appointment scheduling or spiritual product purchasing.
beforeAfter.after: High-conversion modern Next.js platform for video consultations, e-commerce gemstones, and personalized Vedic advisory.

timeline.label: UI & Advisory Scoping
timeline.desc: Designing spiritual product catalog and consultation slot workflows.

timeline.label: Next.js Development
timeline.desc: Component-based frontend build, cart flow, and SEO tuning.

sections.title: The Challenge
sections.content: Nakshatraloka needed a modern digital presence to bring traditional Vedic astrology services online, enabling client consultations and spiritual product sales.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.content: We engineered a scalable, component-based Next.js frontend with a strong focus on high performance, mobile responsiveness, and clean UI/UX for consultation booking.

sections.title: The Outcome
sections.content: A premium astrology platform enabling users to book consultations, explore authentic gemstones and Rudraksha products, and access personalized spiritual guidance.

title: Shree Sneh Foundation — Community & NGO Platform

kpis.label: Social Scope
kpis.detail: Rural education, hunger, elder & orphan care

beforeAfter.before: No centralized digital platform to showcase ground initiatives or accept online volunteer signups.
beforeAfter.after: Comprehensive NGO web portal with initiative galleries, donor support flows, and transparent campaign logs.

timeline.label: Need Audit
timeline.desc: Cataloging field initiatives across education, hunger relief, and elder care.

timeline.label: Platform Launch
timeline.desc: Accessible, high-contrast website built for fast loading on all mobile networks.

sections.title: The Challenge
sections.content: Shree Sneh Foundation required a trustworthy, accessible online presence to communicate their work in rural education, food distribution, and orphan care to prospective donors and volunteers.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.content: We crafted a warm yet highly structured digital platform that highlights real field impact photos, program details, and simple donation workflows.

sections.title: The Outcome
sections.content: A high-trust web platform that expanded their volunteer base and streamlined fundraising initiatives.

title: Growth Edge — Insurance Advisory & Claims Platform

kpis.label: Client Satisfaction
kpis.detail: 4+ years of trusted service in Ahmedabad

beforeAfter.before: Offline advisory reliant on manual phone calls and paper policy reviews.
beforeAfter.after: Modern Next.js web portal with instant consultation booking via Cal.com and policy coverage guides.

timeline.label: Advisory Scoping
timeline.desc: Mapping health, life, and motor insurance product categories.

timeline.label: Next.js Build
timeline.desc: SSR architecture, Cal.com scheduling embed, and trust badge modules.

sections.title: The Challenge
sections.content: Growth Edge needed a modern digital advisory portal in Ahmedabad to streamline policy consultations, highlight their ₹50Cr+ claim settlement record, and accept online appointment bookings.

sections.title: Our Approach
sections.content: We built a high-performance Next.js application integrated with Cal.com (`cal.com/nityam-dixit-opchjp/30min`) for instant strategy calls and transparent policy comparison guides.

sections.title: The Outcome
sections.content: A high-conversion insurance platform that reinforces Growth Edge's position as a premier financial advisory firm.

kpis.label: WhatsApp AI
kpis.detail: Turns conversations into qualified, CRM-ready leads

beforeAfter.before: Manual WhatsApp message handling, slow response times, missed inquiries, and human data extraction errors.
beforeAfter.after: Automated WhatsApp AI conversation flows with instant lead qualification and CRM extraction.

timeline.label: Meta API Setup
timeline.desc: Meta WhatsApp Business API webhooks & Facebook Login for Business OAuth onboarding.

timeline.label: AI Lead Pipeline
timeline.desc: Contextual conversation memory & 2-prompt OpenAI intent parsing to extract name, service, and urgency.

timeline.label: Production Hardening
timeline.desc: Redis-backed rate limiting & idempotency to prevent duplicate replies from Meta retry spikes.

sections.title: The Problem & Challenge
sections.content: Businesses that live on WhatsApp inbound waste hundreds of hours manually answering chats. LeadFlow solves this by turning incoming WhatsApp messages into qualified leads automatically without a human having to answer every conversation.

sections.title: Engineering & Architecture
sections.content: LeadFlow (also built under the name Saarthi) is built multi-tenant from the ground up. Key technical milestones include a two-prompt OpenAI extraction pattern for structured lead data (name, service, urgency), contextual conversation memory, and a Redis rate-limiting queue to handle Meta's aggressive retry behaviors.

sections.title: The Production SaaS Product
sections.content: A high-concurrency WhatsApp automation platform featuring live dashboard CRM syncing, tiered multi-tenant billing (₹1,499 / ₹2,999 / ₹4,999 per month), and seamless Meta OAuth setup.
